description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a streamlined, rectangular receiver and a prominent, elongated barrel. The barrel appears to have a ribbed or vented section along its underside, likely for heat dissipation or grip. The stock is angular and compact, featuring a textured grip area and a buttpad, suggesting ergonomic handling. The trigger guard is elongated and rectangular, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly gloved use. The overall finish is matte, with a combination of light gray and black surfaces, giving it a tactical, utilitarian appearance. The construction appears robust, with most components likely made from metal and reinforced polymer.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a rectangular receiver, ribbed barrel, and compact, angular stock in matte gray and black. Features include a vented barrel section and an elongated trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrel openings and the rectangular receiver profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, ribbed barrel, angular stock, and the extended trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the textured buttpad and the cylindrical grip of the stock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same ribbed barrel and stock details, with clear visibility of the receiver's top.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with ribbed venting along the underside
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated rectangular trigger guard with a straight profile and ample finger space
